connect.title: Connect your WhatsApp
connect.instructions: On your phone, open WhatsApp and go to Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device, then scan the QR code below.
connect.press: Press Connect to generate a pairing code.

contacts.title: Upload contacts
contacts.description: Pick a CSV with a phone column (and optionally a name column). Extra columns become message tokens.
contacts.dropzone: Drop a CSV here or click to browse

compose.title: Compose your message
compose.help: Use tokens like {{example}} to personalise each message.

send.title: Send
send.summary: Sending to {{count}} contacts with a randomized {{min}}–{{max}}s delay between messages.

pacing.title: Sending & pacing
pacing.description: Randomized delays make sending look human and protect your number.

risk.caution: Brisk pace — some ban risk. Consider slowing down.
risk.danger: Very fast — high ban risk. Slow down to protect your number.

pacing.floorHint: For safety, the minimum delay can't be set below 1 second.
pacing.capHint: Stop after this many messages in one run. 0 means no limit.
pacing.stopFailuresHint: Abort if this many messages fail in a row (likely a block). 0 disables it.
pacing.randomizeHint: Shuffle recipients so sends look less automated.
pacing.typingHint: Show a typing indicator before each message.

message.title: Message defaults
message.description: How messages are rendered before sending.
message.missingTokenHint: What to do when a placeholder has no value for a contact.
message.footerHint: Append an opt-out line to every message.

csv.title: CSV import
csv.countryCodeHint: Prepended to local numbers that have no country code.

account.title: Account & connection
account.appearOnlineHint: Mark your session online while the app is running.
account.autoReconnectHint: Reconnect automatically after a dropped connection.
account.unlinkHint: Log out and forget the stored WhatsApp session.

data.title: Updates & data
data.description: App updates and where your data lives.
data.autoUpdateHint: Check for and install updates on launch.
data.resetHint: Restore all settings to their defaults.
